name: Twist POP
description: The Twist POP performs non-linear deformations on points such as Twist, Bend, Shear, Taper, Linear Taper, and Squash & Stretch. You set up one or two axes (X, Y or Z) and a pivot point to determine the direction and center of deformation. The amount of deformation is set by the Strength parameter, and the rolloff away from the pivot point and/or axes is affected by the Rolloff parameter. The amount of deformation can also be increased or decreased using a Weight attribute, which multiplies the Strength per-point. You can deform any point, vertex or primitive attribute.

parameters.name: Attribute Class
parameters.label: Attribute Class
parameters.description: Makes the POP operate on point attributes, vertex attributes or primitive attributes where applicable.

parameters.name: Input Attribute Scope
parameters.label: Input Attribute Scope
parameters.description: Input's attributes you want to affect within the chosen attribute class, or attribute components.

parameters.name: Weight Attribute
parameters.label: Weight Attribute
parameters.description: Specifies the scope of the attribute that stores weight values

parameters.name: Primary Axis
parameters.label: Primary Axis
parameters.description: Primary transform axis of the twist.

parameters.name: Pivot
parameters.label: Pivot
parameters.description: The pivot point for the transform rotates and scales.

parameters.name: Rolloff
parameters.label: Rolloff
parameters.description: Rolloff factor on the twist operation.

parameters.name: Output Attribute Scope
parameters.label: Output Attribute Scope
parameters.description: Name of attribute to output (can choose components of attribute), can choose from menu.
